findings.text: Both NAP-SRC-0028 and NAP-SRC-0029 extracted texts are identical, containing an email from accommodation@napier.ac.uk to Anfal Elbushra dated 12/03/2026 with subject 'Edinburgh Napier University Tenancy Agreement 2025-26' and an attachment named 'MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA Student Licence.pdf'.
The extracted text does not include the content of the attached Student Licence PDF; it only contains the email body. The actual tenancy agreement terms are not present in the extracted text.

The extraction method (pdftotext) may have only captured the email body and not the embedded attachment. The attachment 'MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA Student Licence.pdf' (3 MB) likely contains the actual tenancy agreement terms and needs separate extraction.

proposed_artifacts.content:
## Verification Result

**Source IDs:** NAP-SRC-0028, NAP-SRC-0029

**Extracted Text:** Both sources produced identical extracted text containing an email from Edinburgh Napier University accommodation to Anfal Elbushra (40805511) dated 12/03/2026. The email references a tenancy agreement attachment named 'MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA Student Licence.pdf' (3 MB).

**Issue:** The extracted text does not include the content of the attached PDF. The actual tenancy agreement terms are missing.

**Recommendation:** Perform separate extraction of the attachment from the original PDF files to obtain the full tenancy agreement.
proposed_artifacts.title: Verification Report for NAP-SRC-0028 and NAP-SRC-0029

proposed_tasks.instructions: Extract the embedded attachment 'MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA Student Licence.pdf' from the original PDF files NAP-SRC-0028 and NAP-SRC-0029. Use a tool capable of extracting embedded PDF attachments (e.g., pdfdetach or similar). Save the extracted attachment as a new source file and run text extraction on it.
proposed_tasks.title: Extract attached Student Licence PDF from NAP-SRC-0028 and NAP-SRC-0029

summary: Both NAP-SRC-0028 and NAP-SRC-0029 extracted texts are identical, containing an email from Edinburgh Napier University accommodation to Anfal Elbushra with a tenancy agreement attachment. The extracted text likely represents only the email body, not the attached tenancy agreement PDF. The actual content of the attached Student Licence PDF is missing. Further extraction of the attachment is needed.

uncertainties.reason: The extracted text does not contain the tenancy agreement terms; the attachment content is missing.
